rows.label: qev030602_MSG0001
rows.name:
Damn it... my legs won't move, na...
I was planning to feed some Imp Lophid
meat to that guy Nemard, too... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0002
rows.name:
Ggh... at this rate... I'll
be their prey, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Hmm? Are you an Earthling? Imp Lophids
appear around here... Don't just stand
around, you'd better run away quickly, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev03060201_JNK0010
rows.name: Help[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev03060201_SEL0011
rows.name: Help Heptana for now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev03060201_JNK0020
rows.name: Inform[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev03060201_SEL0021
rows.name: Inform her that Nemard said he wants to marry her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0004
rows.name:
...You saved me, na. There's a man I have
to support... so I can't die here. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0005
rows.name:
He's not brave like you, so...
I have to be by his side, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Eh!? You came here because
Nemard told you to!? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0007
rows.name: And... he says he wants to marry me!? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0008
rows.name:
Heh heh... if that's the case, then I
really can't afford to be eaten by Imp
Lophids in a place like this... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0009
rows.name:
He wants... me? ...Heh heh, he really
is a hopeless guy, na... I guess I
really do have to support him, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0010
rows.name:
If that's the case, then I really
can't afford to be eaten by Imp
Lophids in a place like this... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0011
rows.name:
I'm sorry... This is the request of
a lifetime from Heptana Logur, na...
I want you to help me, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0012
rows.name:
...They've come back... Please,
defeat them... Let me see Nemard's
face one more time, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0013
rows.name:
Thank you, na! If you hadn't come, I would
have been eaten by the Imp Lophids! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0014
rows.name:
My injuries are... yeah! I'm fine now! I
should be able to walk back like this. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Heh heh, marriage, huh. Say, what
do you think of Nemard? Don't you
think he's a little unreliable, na? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_JNK0030
rows.name: Favorable[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_SEL0031
rows.name: Express a favorable opinion about Nemard.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_JNK0040
rows.name: Critical[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_SEL0041
rows.name: Express a critical opinion about Nemard.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0016
rows.name:
You have a good eye for men, na. Yes...
he's always unreliable, but na... when
it counts, he's a man who steps up. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0017
rows.name:
He can't stand up to his little sister
Liana, and he's terrible at hunting...
He really is a hopeless guy. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0018
rows.name:
But you see... even though he's such a
weakling, he risked his life for me, na.
When it counts, he's a man who steps up. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0019
rows.name:
When we were captured by the Growth,
na... I was almost assaulted. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0020
rows.name:
But right then, Nemard charged at those
armed guys with his bare hands, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0021
rows.name:
He got beaten up so badly I thought
he'd be killed, but he just laughed
and said "it's nothing"... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0022
rows.name:
...He really is a hopeless guy, na.
If I'm not by his side, he's so
reckless I can't help but worry. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0023
rows.name:
...I'll marry him. The wedding will
probably happen as soon as we return.
You have to attend the ceremony too, na! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0024
rows.name:
The horn ring Nemard made for
me... It was made from the horn
of quite a strong beast, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0025
rows.name:
Even though he's completely useless at hunting,
he got all battered up making it for me with all
his might. ...He really is a hopeless guy, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0026
rows.name:
Marrying Nemard, huh... It still
doesn't quite feel real yet, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0027
rows.name:
But... once I put on the horn ring, will the
feeling that we're going to live together
strike me right in the chest, I wonder? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0028
rows.name: Ah! You finally came back! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0029
rows.name:
We have a favor we'd like to
ask of you, na. Could you go
talk to Nemard for a bit? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0030
rows.name:
So Nemard liked that
quiet type after all... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0031
rows.name:
Hmph... He can go be happy
for all I care, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030602_MSG0032
rows.name:
This is no time for chatting, na!
Hurry up and defeat them, na! [ST:wait ]
